name: MHA- Mirko Costume Party
description:
Meet Mirko

You decided to host a silly party in the dorms to have everyone dress up like the pro hero Mirko in her hero costume. Then Endeavor wanted to be a buzzkill..

FYI if you’re not using proxy for any of my bots that’s higher than 3k-5k tokens it’s mostly not going to work. Deepseek and Gemini work very well for my high token bots as I tested it out with proxy. So yeah if you only JLLM you’re going to have JLLM issues.

Use if bot is speaking for you: [ooc: Do not describe the thoughts or actions of {{user}}, this is strictly forbidden. Only portray {{char}}. Do not SPEAK for {{user}}.]
